source.predict_sum:
def predict_sum(model, img1, img2):
    """Simple argmax approach: predict each digit, add them."""
    model.eval()
    with torch.no_grad():
        pred1 = model(img1).argmax(dim=1)
        pred2 = model(img2).argmax(dim=1)
    return (pred1 + pred2).cpu()
